codeReview.summary: The commit enforces strict scope routing for the install-all path and removes hardcoded user scope from `skills -y` and `skill <name>`. This matches the feature contract for project-default scope and explicit `--user` scope routing across the required install command paths.

issues.description: Test case `skills -y -n --user routes to user home` has no assertion beyond exit code. It does not actually verify destination routing to HOME, so this scenario is under-asserted in automated coverage.

summary: Review complete for install-scoping-strict-scope-routing. Implementation satisfies the strict project-vs-user scope behavior required by the milestone, with one non-blocking test-strength issue (missing routing assertion in one skills user-scope test).
